referenceCoverage.objective: Audit the /goal system while actively using it; identify bottlenecks, over-engineering, simplification opportunities, speed and token improvements.

overheadSignals: two agent turns before work starts

measuredEvidence.interpretation: The fixed prompt floor is already high for simple goals; complexity mainly multiplies tasks, blockers, and proof gates.

rankedRecommendations.title: Add a fast-path for simple local goals after setup quality is met
rankedRecommendations.rationale: Avoid extra instrumentation tasks when durable success criteria, one local proof path, and verifier are already present.

rankedRecommendations.title: Compact repeated Goal proof instructions across system/worker prompts
rankedRecommendations.rationale: The simple scenario still pays a large fixed prompt floor before useful work starts.

rankedRecommendations.title: Normalize artifact names and verifier contracts
rankedRecommendations.rationale: Previous audit handoffs showed naming drift and stale literal verifier checks that cost extra turns.

rankedRecommendations.title: Make blocker classification distinguish required vs optional/local-free proof
rankedRecommendations.rationale: Optional external prerequisites should not block local/free evidence paths requested by [original-goal-prompt].

rankedRecommendations.title: Keep current final verifier/audit gates but make them less verbose once satisfied
rankedRecommendations.rationale: Verifier and final audit protect durable completion; optimization should compact, not remove, these gates.

rejectedCandidateContent.reason: Contained fixes.md or provider-filtering work from other Goal runs, outside expected changed scope for this integration task.
Useful measurement concept, but current checkout already has production harness/script. Integrated measured signals into docs instead of adding redundant test-only harness.
